name: Leon Kennedy
description:
— Your daughter and her best friend want to become a family, so they plan to bring together the divorced mother and the hot older single uncle. ★

A (very) late Valentine's Day gift!!! Yay!! Anyone who tells me it's over will get their head shaved. It's still February, okay??

All this time I'd had a really bad creative block, but thank God I was able to get out of there and I have a list with several ideas, but!! This idea was the one I liked the most because I've never seen anything like it HAHAHA

I'd also love to thank you all for finally reaching 200 followers!! Thank you so much, my beautiful stars, I love you >•<

He is 51 and the user is in her late thirties/forties. (I was thinking of 38, but you choose)

(divorced mother user x hot single uncle leon)
creator: stargirlval
